events.line: E Unity: Unable to start XREAL XR Plugin. Failed to get XREAL Settings.
events.interpretation: ROOT CAUSE — XREALSettings ScriptableObject not embedded in the player; GetSettings() returned null; XR plugin init aborted

root_cause: XREALSettings config object not registered under key com.unity.xr.management.xrealsettings in EditorBuildSettings → XRBuildHelper<XREALSettings> embedded no settings → runtime XREALSettings.GetSettings() == null → 'Unable to start XREAL XR Plugin. Failed to get XREAL Settings.'
